name: connectors
description: Connector body (housing/shell) envelope dimensions for common PC/SBC panel and slot connectors — USB-A/A-stacked/A-stacked-shielded/C/micro, RJ45/RJ45-stacked/RJ45-shallow, HDMI (A/mini/micro), PCIe card-edge slot, 2.54mm GPIO header, single-port SFP/SFP+ cage. See RESEARCH.md for per-type evidence and tiering.
sources: PCI-SIG PCI Express Card Electromechanical (CEM) Spec — named standard, not fetched (member-paywalled); backs pcie_x1/x4/x8 //VERIFY
USB Implementers Forum (usb.org) USB 2.0 + Type-C mechanical specs — named standard, not fetched (login/EULA-gated this pass)
